title: Phantom Drain

list.definition:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC
list.label: Car
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC

list.label: Efficiency (Wh/km)
list.name: efficiency
list.query: SELECT efficiency FROM cars WHERE id = $car_id

description: Phantom drain analysis: how much range is lost between drives, why, and when. Part of Teslamate Ecos custom dashboards.

panels.description: Average range lost per day. Only gaps 30min–7 days. Zero-loss days included.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND(AVG(loss)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Daily Loss ['$length_unit']" FROM (SELECT end_date::date AS day, SUM(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0)) AS loss FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168 GROUP BY 1) AS daily

panels.title: Avg Daily Loss

panels.description: Average range lost per hour while parked. Only gaps 30min–7 days.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND((SUM(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(gap_hours), 0))::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Hourly Loss ['$length_unit'/h]" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168

panels.title: Avg Hourly Loss

panels.description: Total range lost to phantom drain. Only gaps 30min–7 days.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND(SUM(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Total Lost ['$length_unit']" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168

panels.title: Total Range Lost

panels.description: Estimated cumulative energy lost using $efficiency variable.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT ROUND((SUM(GREATEST(end_range_km - next_start_range_km, 0)) * $efficiency / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Est. Energy Lost [kWh]" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range_km IS NOT NULL AND end_range_km > next_start_range_km AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168

panels.title: Est. Energy Lost

panels.description: Daily phantom drain (bars) with 7-day rolling average (orange dashed). Only gaps 30min–7 days.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT end_date::date AS time, ROUND(SUM(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Range Lost ['$length_unit']" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT day AS time, ROUND(AVG(loss) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)::numeric, 1) AS "7-Day Avg" FROM (SELECT end_date::date AS day, SUM(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0)) AS loss FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168 GROUP BY 1) AS daily ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Phantom Drain

panels.description: Monthly total range lost. Each bar = one calendar month.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT TO_CHAR(end_date::date, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Month", ROUND(SUM(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Total Loss ['$length_unit']" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Monthly Range Loss

panels.description: Average drain by day of week. Higher values may indicate Sentry Mode or scheduled events.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km AS end_range_km, LEAD(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range_km FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT CASE EXTRACT(DOW FROM end_date) WHEN 0 THEN 'Sun' WHEN 1 THEN 'Mon' WHEN 2 THEN 'Tue' WHEN 3 THEN 'Wed' WHEN 4 THEN 'Thu' WHEN 5 THEN 'Fri' WHEN 6 THEN 'Sat' END AS "Day", ROUND(AVG(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Loss ['$length_unit']" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168 GROUP BY EXTRACT(DOW FROM end_date) ORDER BY EXTRACT(DOW FROM end_date)

panels.title: By Day of Week

panels.description: Average hourly drain rate by outside temperature. Cold and hot extremes both increase phantom drain.

targets.rawSql: WITH drive_gaps AS (SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range, LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours, LEAD(d.outside_temp_avg) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_outside_temp FROM drives d WHERE d.car_id = $car_id AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date) AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL) SELECT CASE WHEN next_outside_temp < -10 THEN '< -10°C' WHEN next_outside_temp < 0 THEN '-10 to 0°C' WHEN next_outside_temp < 10 THEN '0 to 10°C' WHEN next_outside_temp < 20 THEN '10 to 20°C' WHEN next_outside_temp < 30 THEN '20 to 30°C' ELSE '> 30°C' END AS "Temperature", CASE WHEN next_outside_temp < -10 THEN 1 WHEN next_outside_temp < 0 THEN 2 WHEN next_outside_temp < 10 THEN 3 WHEN next_outside_temp < 20 THEN 4 WHEN next_outside_temp < 30 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END AS sort, ROUND(AVG((GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0) / NULLIF(gap_hours, 0)))::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Hourly Loss ['$length_unit'/h]", COUNT(*) AS "Sessions" FROM drive_gaps WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL AND end_range > next_start_range AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168 AND next_outside_temp IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2

panels.title: By Outside Temperature
Drain Rate Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of range loss per parking gap. Bucket size: 0.25 km. Shows how often different drain levels occur across all parking events.

targets.rawSql:
WITH drive_gaps AS (
  SELECT
    d.start_date, d.end_date,
    convert_km(d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit') AS end_range,
    LEAD(convert_km(d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km, '$length_unit')) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) AS next_start_range,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(d.start_date) OVER (ORDER BY d.start_date) - d.end_date)) / 3600 AS gap_hours
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.start_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND d.end_${preferred_range}_range_km IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  width_bucket(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0), 0, 6, 24) * 0.25 - 0.125 AS bucket,
  COUNT(*)::int AS frequency
FROM drive_gaps
WHERE next_start_range IS NOT NULL
  AND end_range > next_start_range
  AND gap_hours > 0.5 AND gap_hours < 168
GROUP BY width_bucket(GREATEST(end_range - next_start_range, 0), 0, 6, 24)
ORDER BY bucket
